title: Swear Fealty
signIn: Present yourself at Court to commence your session
forgotPassword: I have forgotten my secret sigil
forgotPasswordInstructions: Enter the pigeon post address you use to swear fealty to your account in the royal ledger
forgotPasswordSendEmail: We shall dispatch a carrier pigeon with instructions to choose a new secret sigil.
loginToMyAccount: Swear Fealty to My Account in the Royal Ledger
twoFactorInstructions: Use your configured authenticator to obtain a code and enter it here.
emailVerificationInstructions: Enter the security code dispatched to your pigeon post address.
error: By the King's wrath — an error!
createYourAccount: Establish Your Account in the Royal Ledger Now
createAccount: Establish Account in the Royal Ledger
noAccountYet: Hast thou not yet pledged allegiance?
welcomeBack: Welcome back to our growing Kingdom
pleaseEnterEmail: Please enter a pigeon post address
pleaseEnterValidEmail: Please enter a valid pigeon post address
pleaseEnterGiftcard: Please enter a gift scroll number
errorOccurred: By the King's wrath — an error occurred!
invalidCode: Invalid code, please enter the correct code.

oauth.twoFactorPrompt: Dual authentication rite is granted for this account in the royal ledger. Enter your authenticator code to complete your fealty.
oauth.noLinkedAccount: No bound account found for {name}. Enter your existing fealty credentials to bind, or establish a new account.
oauth.linkExistingAccount: Bind Existing Account in the Royal Ledger
oauth.createNewAccount: Establish New Account in the Royal Ledger
oauth.verifyEmailSent: A verification code has been dispatched to your pigeon post address.
oauth.error: OAuth By the King's wrath — an error!
oauth.failedToLink: Failed to bind account in the royal ledger
oauth.enterEmailAndPassword: Please enter pigeon post address and secret sigil

sudo.redirecting: Sworn fealty as a subject, redirecting to The Great Hall.

home.allRightsReserved: All rights held by the Crown.

copyright: By Royal Proclamation © {year} — All rights held by the Crown.
